label: Document Type
name: document-type
description: Type of document or source artifact represented by the page or image.

index-card.description: Individual index cards containing structured or semi-structured entries.

minutes.description: Pages containing meeting minutes or protocol records.

directory-page.description: Pages from directories or registers listing people, companies, or institutions.

ledger-page.description: Pages from accounting or bookkeeping ledgers.

letter.description: Letters or other personal and professional correspondence.

manuscript.description: Handwritten manuscript pages, including medieval and early modern codices.
